zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Peshale於1375年出生在英國德比夏爾貝爾培時，她的父親John Hammond28歲，母親Alice Harley26歲。她與John Grendon of Gayton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1435年在英國貝德福爾維爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Peshale于1375年出生在英国德比夏爾貝爾培时，她的父亲John Hammond28岁，母亲Alice Harley26岁。她与John Grendon of Gayton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1435年在英国貝德福爾維爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peshale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from any of more than two dozen places called Penhale in Cornwall, or from places of similar name in Wales, such as Pennal (Merioneths), or from Penheale in Egloskerry (Cornwall). The Cornish places named Penhale derive from Middle Cornish * pen hal ‘moor’s head, marsh’s head’ ( pen ‘head, top, end; promontory’, hal ‘moor, marsh’); Pennal (Merioneths) has the same meaning. Penheale derives from Middle Cornish pen + hel ‘hall’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Peshale was born in 1375, in Belper, Derbyshire, England, her father, John Hammond, was 28 and her mother, Alice Harley, was 26. She married John Grendon of Gayton. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1435, in Willey, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Peshale est née en 1375, à Belper, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John Hammond, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Harley, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Grendon of Gayton. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1435, à Willey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Peshale 1375 in Belper, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hammond 28 und ihre Mutter Alice Harley 26. Sie hat John Grendon of Gayton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1435 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Willey, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Peshale è nata il nel 1375 nel Belper, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, John Hammond, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Alice Harley, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Grendon of Gayton. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1435, nel Willey, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Peshaleが1375年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアベルペルで生まれた時，父John Hammondは28歳，母Alice Harleyは26歳であった。John Grendon of Gaytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1435年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアウィリーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Peshale(이)가 1375년 영국 더비실르 벨퍼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hammond(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Harley(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 John Grendon of Gayton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1435년 영국 베드퍼드실르 윌리에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Peshale nasceu em 1375, em Belper, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hammond, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice Harley, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Grendon of Gayton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1435, em Willey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Peshale родилась в 1375 г. в местности белпир, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Hammond было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Harley, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Grendon of Gayton. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1435 г. в местности уилли, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Peshale nació en 1375, en Belper, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hammond, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice Harley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Grendon of Gayton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1435, en Willey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
